auth.title: Sniper TMS Master
auth.sessionLimitConfirm: Do you want to force-close existing sessions and continue login?
auth.errorLocked: Account locked due to too many failed attempts. Try again in {{clock}}.
auth.lockReleased: Account unlocked. Please sign in again.
auth.licenseExpirySoon: License Expiry Notice: Expires in {{days}} day(s). (Expiry date: {{date}}) Please update the license on the Product Info page.

bootstrap.notice: No master admin account exists yet. Initial registration is required.
bootstrap.errorEmpty: Please enter email, password, and confirmation password.
bootstrap.errorPasswordConfirm: Password and confirmation do not match.
bootstrap.passwordPolicy: Password must contain no spaces and satisfy either 10+ characters with at least 2 categories, or 8+ characters with all 3 categories (letters/numbers/special), and must not include 3+ sequential or repeated characters.
bootstrap.registered: Initial admin registration completed. You can now sign in.
bootstrap.registerFailed: Failed to register the initial admin account.
bootstrap.noticeDialogBody: When the first master admin account is registered, a demo license is stored automatically. Please update it with a formal license.

productInfo.title: Product Info
productInfo.subtitle: View release information and license data, then upload a license file to update it.

product.title: Release Information
product.readOnly: Product info is read from product.dat and cannot be edited on this screen.

upload.help: Upload a license file in JSON or key=value text format. Required fields: licenseKey, expiresAt, nicMacAddress(optional)
upload.fileRequired: Please select a license file to upload.

multiTenantDisabled.title: Tenant Creation Unavailable
multiTenantDisabled.detail: Multi-tenant mode is disabled, so new tenants cannot be created.
multiTenantDisabled.restoreDetail: Multi-tenant mode is disabled, so non-system tenants cannot be activated or restored.

database.statusNotReadyDetail: Database check for customer ({{name}}) found missing tables: {{missingTables}}
database.statusFailedDetail: An error occurred while checking the database status for customer ({{name}}).
database.recoverConfirmMessage: Do you want to recover the database and run migrations for customer ({{name}})?
database.recoverFailedDetail: An error occurred while recovering the database for customer ({{name}}).
database.resetConfirmMessage: You are about to reset the database for customer ({{name}}). All existing data will be deleted and cannot be restored. Continue?
database.resetFailedDetail: An error occurred while resetting the database for customer ({{name}}).

dialog.title: Add Tenant
dialog.quotaSectionHelp: The selected tier suggests starting limits, and you can adjust the fields below for this tenant as needed.
dialog.tierDefaults: Selected tier baseline: daily log {{dailyLogQuotaGb}}, max users {{maxUsers}}
dialog.expiresAtOptionalUnlimited: Unlimited tiers or the system tenant do not require an expiration date.
dialog.ipCidrHelp: Press Enter or type a comma to add multiple entries.

validation.slugInvalid: Company code can include lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
validation.contactEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email format.
validation.epsLimitInvalid: EPS limit must be 0 or greater. (0 = unlimited)
validation.storageQuotaGbInvalid: Storage quota must be 0 or greater. (0 = unlimited)
validation.retentionDaysInvalid: Retention must be 0 or greater. (0 = unlimited)
validation.expiresAtInvalid: Please enter a valid expiration date.
validation.ipCidrRequired: At least one log collection target IP range is required.
validation.ipCidrInvalid: Use single IP or CIDR format, and separate multiple entries with commas (,).
validation.ipCidrAllNotAllowed: For non-system tenants, 0.0.0.0 is not allowed in log collection target IP ranges.

validation.dailyLogQuotaGbRequired: Daily log quota must be 0 or greater. (0 = unlimited)
validation.maxUsersRequired: User limit must be 0 or greater. (0 = unlimited)

delete.blockedRuleMessage: Deletion rule: a tier code currently used by tenants cannot be deleted.
delete.inUseReason: This tier is currently used by {{count}} tenant(s), so it cannot be deleted.

result.deleteFailed: An error occurred while deleting the tier.

bootstrap.expiresMinutesHint: Enter between {{min}} and {{max}} minutes (up to 48 hours).
bootstrap.issueSuccessDetail: First-admin registration token has been issued.
bootstrap.issueSuccessDetailSent: The first-admin registration token was sent to {{email}}.
bootstrap.issueSuccessDetailNotSent: Token was issued, but email delivery to {{email}} failed. Reason: {{reason}}
bootstrap.issueConflictDetail: A valid first-admin registration token already exists. Issue a new token after the current one expires.
bootstrap.issueOverwriteConfirmMessage: An active first-admin registration token exists for customer ({{name}}). Do you want to expire it now and issue a new token?
bootstrap.issueFailedDetail: An error occurred while issuing the first-admin registration token.
bootstrap.issueInvalidEmailDetail: If email is provided, it must be a valid email format.
bootstrap.issueInvalidExpiresDetail: Expiration must be between {{min}} and {{max}} minutes.
bootstrap.issueBlockedDetail: An active user already exists, so a first-admin token cannot be issued. Use a password reset token for account recovery.
bootstrap.copyRegistrationLinkSuccessDetail: Admin registration link copied to clipboard.
bootstrap.copyRegistrationLinkFailedDetail: Failed to copy admin registration link.

passwordReset.issueSuccessDetailNotSent: Token was issued, but email delivery to {{email}} failed. Reason: {{reason}}

passwordReset.issueInvalidEmailDetail: Please enter a valid email format.
passwordReset.issueInvalidExpiresDetail: Expiration must be between {{min}} and {{max}} minutes.

authSettings.title: Auth Settings
authSettings.description: Configure login lockout, concurrent sessions, and auto logout policies.
authSettings.saveFailed: An error occurred while saving auth settings.

validation.maxLoginFailures: Max failed login attempts must be between 1 and 5.
validation.lockMinutes: Lock time must be between 3 and 30 minutes.
validation.maxConcurrentSessions: Max concurrent sessions per account must be between 1 and 5.
validation.autoLogoutTimeoutMinutes: Auto logout timeout must be 0 or between 1 and 30 minutes.

lockMinutes.label: Lock time (minutes)
lockMinutes.help: Default 5 min, minimum 3 min, maximum 30 min

autoLogoutTimeoutMinutes.label: Auto logout timeout (minutes)
autoLogoutTimeoutMinutes.help: Default 5 min, minimum 1 min, maximum 30 min, 0 means no timeout

multiTenantMode.label: Multi-tenant Mode
multiTenantMode.help: Sets the global authentication routing mode. Save is required for the change to take effect.
multiTenantMode.impactEnabled: When enabled, tenant login/lock-status/bootstrap flows use tenantSlug and run per tenant.
multiTenantMode.impactDisabled: When disabled, only the system tenant can log in and related auth flows are fixed to system.
multiTenantMode.nonSystemTenantWarning: There are currently {{count}} active/suspended non-system tenant(s).
multiTenantMode.confirmMessageEnable: Enable multi-tenant mode? tenantSlug will be required for tenant login.
multiTenantMode.confirmMessageDisable: Disable multi-tenant mode? Only the system tenant will be allowed to log in.
multiTenantMode.disableBlockedMessage: Cannot disable because there are {{count}} active/suspended non-system tenant(s).
multiTenantMode.requiredActionDeleteTenants: Set the {{count}} active/suspended non-system tenant(s) to deleted first.
multiTenantMode.requiredActionRetryDisable: After updating tenant statuses, try disabling multi-tenant mode again.

smtpSettings.title: SMTP Settings
smtpSettings.description: Configure SMTP connection details used for token email delivery.
smtpSettings.saveFailed: An error occurred while saving SMTP settings.

validation.smtpExternalRequired: In External SMTP mode, both SMTP host and sender email are required.
validation.smtpHostRequired: In External SMTP mode, SMTP host is required.
validation.smtpFromRequired: In External SMTP mode, sender email is required.
validation.smtpHostAndFromPair: When SMTP is enabled, SMTP host and sender address must be provided together.
validation.smtpPort: SMTP port must be between 1 and 65535.

mode.label: SMTP Mode
mode.help: Local mode uses server env SMTP values, while External mode prefers the values configured below.

smtpSettings.passPlaceholder: Enter a new password to update it.
smtpSettings.bootstrapUrlHelp: When set, the token email includes the tenant token registration link.
smtpSettings.passwordResetUrlHelp: When set, password reset token emails include the reset link.

test.help: Sends a test mail with the currently applied SMTP mode (Local/External). Save settings first, then test.
test.success: Test mail sent: to={{to}}, mode={{mode}}, host={{host}}:{{port}}

validation.toRequired: Please enter a test recipient email.
validation.toInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

vectorSettings.title: Vector Pipeline Settings
vectorSettings.description: Manage manufacturer parser profiles and view topic routing policies.
vectorSettings.pipelineSummaryDescription: Maintain tenant isolation in shared-port (514) environments with Vector 2-stage parsing and Router final validation.

pipelineSteps.s3: Vector manufacturer-specific VRL parsing and device_code extraction
pipelineSteps.s5: Router final classification then publish to raw-logs.{tenant_id}

vectorSettings.classificationPriority: Final classification priority: (1) device_code+source_ip -> (2) device_code only -> (3) source_ip only (LOW) -> (4) quarantine
vectorSettings.saveFailed: An error occurred while saving Vector settings.
vectorSettings.outputTopicHelp: Topic that carries successful Vector parse events into the routing engine (Router). (Read-only)
vectorSettings.quarantineTopicHelp: Stores parse failures, ambiguous matches, and unmatched events. (Read-only)
vectorSettings.routerOutputTopicHelp: The routing engine (Router) publishes finally classified events into tenant-scoped topics.
vectorSettings.configVersionHelp: The version is incremented automatically when settings change.
vectorSettings.applyFailed: An error occurred while applying Vector settings.
vectorSettings.dryRunFailed: An error occurred during Vector dry-run validation.
vectorSettings.allowUnknownVendorHelp: When enabled, unknown manufacturer events are handled in a separate path. When disabled, they are routed to quarantine.
vectorSettings.parserProfilesHelp: Configure collection mode and extraction rules per manufacturer.
vectorSettings.applyResultsHelp: You can review Vector apply attempts directly below.

seed.empty: No seed manufacturer profiles are available.
seed.noneAdded: All seed manufacturer profiles are already registered.
seed.added: Added {{count}} seed manufacturer profile(s). Click Save to apply changes.
seed.overwritten: Reapplied {{count}} seed manufacturer profile(s). {{replaced}} existing profile(s) were refreshed to seed defaults. Click Save to apply changes.

profileDialog.authStrategyHelp: Auth strategy is stored as metadata only. Enforce actual auth in gateway/proxy.

validation.profilesJsonInvalid: Parser profiles JSON format is invalid.
validation.profilesArrayRequired: Parser profiles must be a JSON array.
validation.profilesEmpty: At least one parser profile is required.
validation.profileShapeInvalid: Parser profile item shape is invalid.
validation.vendorRequired: Each parser profile must include a manufacturer code.
validation.matchIndicatorsRequired: Each parser profile must include at least one match indicator.
validation.deviceCodeRegexRequired: Each parser profile must include deviceCodeRegex.
validation.portRange: Port must be an integer between 1 and 65535.
validation.intervalRange: Interval must be an integer between 1 and 86400.
validation.enabledRequired: Each parser profile must have enabled set to true or false.

vectorApplyHistory.title: Vector Apply History
vectorApplyHistory.description: Review apply attempts and reload success results.
vectorApplyHistory.loadFailed: Failed to load Vector apply history.

sessionTimeout.dialogMessage: For security, you will be logged out soon. Extend your session to continue.

serverError.description: A server error occurred while processing your request. Please try again shortly or move to the dashboard.
